tools.name: crypto_prices
tools.description:
Get current cryptocurrency prices and market data from CoinGecko.
Args:
    coins: List of coin IDs (e.g. ['bitcoin', 'ethereum']). Empty for top coins.
    max_results: Max results (default 50)

tools.name: exchange_rates
tools.description:
Get current currency exchange rates.
Args:
    base_currency: Base currency code (default 'USD')
